TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kalifangar, title = Kalifangar, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kalifangar} }

S.FORM: alang Kalifangar ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 272 buwan, 589 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 360 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 229 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 59%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kalifangar hya' ga Fafokod. tay mkyahu' na Kalifangar hya' ga Pa'anifong. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kalifangar ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kalifangar ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 272 buwan, 589 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 360 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 229 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 59%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kalifangar hya' ga Fafokod. tay mkyahu' na Kalifangar hya' ga Pa'anifong. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kalifangar ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kali*aŋar ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ħikas~ɕiki ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kali*aŋar ħjaʔ ɣa *a*oko*. taj mkjaħuʔ na kali*aŋar ħjaʔ ɣa paʔani*oŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kali*aŋar ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
